title: THSTI Senior Research Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
organization: Translational Health Science and Technology Institute (THSTI)
short_info: Translational Health Science and Technology Institute (THSTI) Senior Research Scientist Notification 2026 has been released on 21 May 2026 on the official website of THSTI. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the THSTI Senior Research Scientist Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age Relaxation: By five years for SC/ST, three years for OBC, ten years for UR PwBD, thirteen years for OBC PwBD, fifteen years for SC/ST PwBD, up to five years for Central Government servants, to the extent of service rendered for Institute employees, up to the extent of service rendered in defence forces plus 3 years for Ex-servicemen (minimum 6 months attested service).

qualification.details: Senior Research Scientist : MD/ MS/ DNB or equivalent degree in Obstetrics and Gynecology / Pediatrics / Community Medicine from an MCI recognized university with at least five (5) years of post-qualification clinical research experience preferably in the domain of public health, community medicine or maternal and child health OR MDS or equivalent degree from a recognized university with at least six (6) years of post-qualification clinical research experience preferably in the domain of public health, community medicine or maternal and child health OR MBBS/ BDS or equivalent degree from a recognized university with at least eight (8) years of post-qualification clinical research experience in the domain of maternal and child health. Desirable: Demonstrated leadership in clinical research or trials, particularly maternal-child health or multi-site RCTs; Experience in developing and implementing trial monitoring, safety, and quality assurance plans; Familiarity with IRB/ethics submissions, regulatory requirements, and amendment processes; Working knowledge of ICH-GCP and national guidelines; Authorship of peer-reviewed publications; experience in manuscript preparation; Strong organizational, problem-solving, and time management skills; Ability to lead and motivate multi-disciplinary teams and manage competing priorities.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post being advertised by THSTI?
faq.answer: THSTI is recruiting for the post of Senior Research Scientist (Clinical). This is a contractual position offered through a walk-in interview process.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Research Scientist (Clinical) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Senior Research Scientist (Clinical) position. This is a single opening announced in the latest recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for this position?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted through a walk-in interview. Therefore, there is no specific last date to apply; candidates must attend the interview on the scheduled date.

faq.question: Q4. What is the walk-in interview date for the Senior Research Scientist (Clinical) post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Senior Research Scientist (Clinical) post is scheduled to be held on 04 June 2026. Candidates should be present at the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Research Scientist (Clinical) role?
faq.answer: Candidates need an MD/MS/DNB or equivalent with 5 years of clinical research experience, or MDS with 6 years, or MBBS/BDS with 8 years of post-qualification clinical research experience in maternal and child health.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for the Senior Research Scientist (Clinical) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Research Scientist (Clinical) post is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government norms for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Senior Research Scientist (Clinical) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Senior Research Scientist (Clinical) position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 150,000 per month.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Translational Health Science and Technology Institute (THSTI), Faridabad, Haryana, 121001. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and passport-size photographs to the walk-in interview venue.
